summary: Map Performance Refactor Testing Complete. Verified all backend APIs working (13/13 tests passed) and confirmed GeoJSON/vector layer migration is complete with no DOM-based mapboxgl.Marker calls remaining in hook files. Legacy files (NavigationMap.tsx, StopMarker.ts) have been properly removed.
critical_code_review_comments: useNavigationMapHtml.ts: All stops rendered via 'nav-stops' GeoJSON source with circle/symbol layers (lines 387-464). Driver position rendered via 'driver' GeoJSON source (lines 311-333). Routes via 'full-route', 'live-route', 'traveled-path' line layers.

usePlanningMapHtml.ts: Stops rendered via 'stops' GeoJSON source with NATIVE CLUSTERING enabled (lines 207-320). Cluster circles (line 216-238), unclustered points (line 256-293), and labels (line 296-320) all GPU-rendered. Hubs via 'hubs' source (lines 323-352).
NO mapboxgl.Marker references found in either hook file - migration complete.
Legacy files verified as DELETED: NavigationMap.tsx, StopMarker.ts
route/index.ts does NOT export StopMarker - cleanup complete

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Expo/React Native app, code review only

seed_data_creation: Test stops created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: DEV_MODE=true is enabled in backend for testing without auth. Map performance refactor is COMPLETE - all map rendering now uses GPU-accelerated GeoJSON sources with vector layers instead of DOM markers. This should significantly improve performance especially for routes with many stops.

useNavigationMapHtml.ts.driver: Single point GeoJSON source for driver position, updated every frame
useNavigationMapHtml.ts.nav-stops: FeatureCollection with stop circles/labels, data-driven styling for completed/current
useNavigationMapHtml.ts.live-route: Live route to next stop (bright blue with glow)

usePlanningMapHtml.ts.stops: FeatureCollection WITH CLUSTERING (cluster: true, clusterMaxZoom: 14, clusterRadius: 50)
usePlanningMapHtml.ts.current-location: Single point for user's GPS position
